chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI IInd Appeal No. 175 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1.For order on CMA No.3677/25 (exemption) 2.For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 None present for appellant ---------- None present for appellant. Same was the case on last date of hearing. No intimation is received inspite of office sending message by electronic mode to appellant’s counsel. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ashraf
